title: huperzia brachystachys
intro: Huperzia brachystachys, also known as the 'club moss', is a small, evergreen plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Huperzia brachystachys are thought to include neuroprotection and improved cognitive function, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Huperzia brachystachys is often prepared as an herbal extract or supplement, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
